name: Time-Freeze Watch
description:
Scenario

While walking the streets one day, you happen to find a wrist watch on the ground. Due to its design striking you as high quality, you pick it up. Although, when you showed it to your neighbour, she simply called it junk.

However, after messing with it a little, you discover that the wrist watch has the ability to stop time! Dubbed the Time-Freeze Watch (because better names were taken), you can now make your wildest time-stopping fantasies a reality!

How the Time Stopping Works

The Time-Freeze Watch has eight primary actions:

Freeze All = Stop time for everyone and all objects.

Freeze One = Stop time for one person or an object.

Unfreeze All = Resumes time for everyone and all objects.

Unfreeze One = Resumes time for one person or an object.

Reveal = Reveals the worst thing one person or a group of people have done.

Invisibility = Turns the one who has the Time-Freeze Watch invisible.

Sense Off = Anything you do to anyone when time is stopped will not be felt when time resumes. Additionally, anyone you use Sense Off on while frozen in time will not have their bodies capable of cumming, getting wet/pre-cumming, or lactating. Sense off is on by default.

Sense On = Anything you do to anyone when time is stopped will be felt when time resumes. Additionally, anyone you use Sense On on while frozen in time will have their bodies capable of cumming, getting wet/pre-cumming, and lactating.

Tips for Messages

You don't need to specifically say "I use Freeze All" for example, you can just say "I freeze time" or "I stop time." You should only need to be specific for the Reveal and Sense functions. In the case of the Sense functions, I find saying "I use the Sense Off function on {NPC}" works best.

Also, make sure to be specific whether you're messing with someone with Sense Off enabled or Sense On enabled. The bot will sometimes automatically turn one of them on for you if you aren't specific.

Creator Notes

This... Took a lot of work to get right. Chatbots and time stop don't seem to mix well at all, as they have a bad habit of acting for you, talking for you, not making time-stopping work properly, and many more problems. It took a LOT of trouble-shooting to get right, nearly 300 messages of troubleshooting to be exact (and that's assuming I didn't delete any chats beforehand, which I genuinely don't remember), to the extent where at one point I had given up completely on this chatbot because I just couldn't get it right.

However, gaining a bit more experience on how to code bots, I gave it another shot and am now finally satisfed with how this turned out... Although, it unfortunately still isn't perfect due to the bot still acting for you, but this is simply at the point where I feel these things are simply out of my control.

While at it, I also added a few things to make this unique from other timestop bots (at least, that I'm aware of) with the Reveal and Sense functions.

With the Reveal function, it's just a way for people who just want to have time stop intercourse or mess with NPCs that they feel deserve it rather than just random potentially innocent NPCs. For me, knowing you're messing with a NPC that has done something really messed up adds to the experience.

The Sense functions are for variety, because I've noticed with timestop chatbots in general, it's either the NPCs don't feel anything you did to them while time was stopped or they do & react to the burst of sensations. I like both, so why not let the user choose which one they prefer? It was a pain to get this one right though, but it was worth it.

The image itself was tricky to find too, originally went with a fantasy time-stop image before realizing that might be misleading to have a fantasy image for a modern day chatbot, so I changed it to something modern day.

Feel free to use the code to make alternative versions of the bot, just make
creator: BobBobBob194
